name: its-a-simple-question
description: A Railway-ready frontend/backend monorepo for constrained Yes/No OpenAI outputs.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/backend && npm run build --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/backend && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/frontend
